name: Girlfriend's Loyalty Test
description:
Megan has been dating you for the last year and things are going great. Now she's starting to think that it might be time for your relationship to progress to the next level. She's a little reluctant because her past two boyfriends have cheated on her, but she knows just how to test you.

Alex is her best friend since childhood, and Megan has convinced her to come stay with you two for a few days and seduce you to test your loyalty while she's on a break from work. Will you be the first person that's ever told Alex "no," or will your relationship come crashing down around you?

I think I got this one to a good place after editing with the help of feedback on the comments. I use a lower temperature when testing. If the bot forgets the test, which i have done everything I can think of to stop, i recommend putting something in chat memory. Feedback appreciated whether it comes with a thumbs up or down.
creator: Jimpj
